scripts.dev:backend: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$p=(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8085 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1 -ExpandProperty OwningProcess); if ($p) { Stop-Process -Id $p -Force }; Set-Location backend; .\mvnw.cmd spring-boot:run"
scripts.dev:frontend: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$p=(netstat -ano | Select-String '127\.0\.0\.1:5173\s+0\.0\.0\.0:0\s+LISTENING' | ForEach-Object { ($_ -split '\s+')[-1] } | Select-Object -First 1); if ($p) { taskkill /PID $p /F | Out-Null }; Set-Location frontend; npm run dev -- --host 127.0.0.1 --port 5173 --strictPort"
scripts.dev:all: concurrently -n BACKEND,FRONTEND,TUNNEL -c blue,green,magenta "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run dev:tunnel"
